level1.name: type.n.01
level1.definition: a subdivision of a particular kind of thing

level1.name: undertaking.n.01
level1.definition: any piece of work that is undertaken or attempted

level1.name: importance.n.01
level1.definition: the quality of being important and worthy of note

level1.name: self.n.01
level1.definition: your consciousness of your own identity

level1.name: idea.n.01
level1.definition: the content of cognition; the main thing you are thinking about

level1.name: tree.n.01
level1.definition: a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

level2.name: kind.n.01
level2.definition: a category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality

level2.name: change.n.01
level2.definition: an event that occurs when something passes from one state or phase to another

level2.name: work.n.01
level2.definition: activity directed toward making or doing something

level2.name: value.n.02
level2.definition: the quality (positive or negative) that renders something desirable or valuable

level2.name: consciousness.n.01
level2.definition: an alert cognitive state in which you are aware of yourself and your situation

level2.name: content.n.05
level2.definition: the sum or range of what has been perceived, discovered, or learned

level2.name: woody_plant.n.01
level2.definition: a plant having hard lignified tissues or woody parts especially stems

level3.name: category.n.02
level3.definition: a general concept that marks divisions or coordinations in a conceptual scheme

level3.name: worth.n.02
level3.definition: the quality that renders something desirable or valuable or useful

level3.name: change_of_state.n.01
level3.definition: the act of changing something into something different in essential characteristics

level3.name: cognitive_state.n.01
level3.definition: the state of a person's cognitive processes

level3.name: cognition.n.01
level3.definition: the psychological result of perception and learning and reasoning

level3.name: vascular_plant.n.01
level3.definition: green plant having a vascular system: ferns, gymnosperms, angiosperms

level4.name: concept.n.01
level4.definition: an abstract or general idea inferred or derived from specific instances

level4.name: quality.n.01
level4.definition: an essential and distinguishing attribute of something or someone; --Shakespeare

level4.name: psychological_state.n.01
level4.definition: (psychology) a mental condition in which the qualities of a state are relatively constant even though the state itself may be dynamic

level4.name: plant.n.02
level4.definition: (botany) a living organism lacking the power of locomotion

top_concepts.name: type.n.01
top_concepts.definition: a subdivision of a particular kind of thing

top_concepts.name: kind.n.01
top_concepts.definition: a category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality

top_concepts.name: category.n.02
top_concepts.definition: a general concept that marks divisions or coordinations in a conceptual scheme
